message.content: can you build the project and commit the result

input.command: npm run build && git commit -am wip

message.content: Don't chain shell commands with && — split them into separate Bash calls so the permission allowlist matches.

content.text: Understood. From now on I'll run each shell command as its own Bash call instead of chaining with &&.

message.content: why do the payments-api integration tests pass locally but do nothing in CI?

content.text: The payments-api integration suite silently no-ops unless the env var LOCALSTACK=1 is exported. Your local shell sets it but CI does not, so the tests skip every case. Add LOCALSTACK=1 to the CI environment to fix it.

message.content: got it, that was the issue — adding it to CI now
